sentiment.reasoning: Presenting at a summit offers visibility and potential networking, but the direct financial impact is indirect and uncertain without more details on the presentation content.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
